channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  3. Best Last-Minute Father’s Day Headphone Deals  Consequence of Sound
  4. Get ahead of Prime Day with the best TechRadar-tested audio kit of June 2026 — know the products now; snap up deals later  TechRadar
  5. Amazon's noise-canceling wireless earbuds with 70 hours of playback time are just $25 ahead of Prime Day  thestreet.com

item.title: Spyro: A Realm Beyond studio admits "loud and consistent" fans convinced Xbox to bring the franchise back to life - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Spyro: A Realm Beyond studio admits "loud and consistent" fans convinced Xbox to bring the franchise back to life  Eurogamer
  2. Spyro: A Realm Beyond dev says the "loud and consistent" fans who bought 11 million copies of the Reignited trilogy helped manifest the series' first new game in years  GamesRadar+
  3. Spyro: A Realm Beyond Announced at Xbox Games Showcase, Features 'True Dragon Flight' and Return of Tom Kenny  IGN
  4. Spyro the Dragon returns with a new game after almost two decades  The Guardian
  5. After a stint on Warzone, Toys for Bob is thrilled to be back on Spyro – "We were moving away from the types of games that are near and dear to our hearts"  GamesIndustry.biz

item.title: Send Crimson Desert your "fun and incredible videos", and you could win an all-expenses-paid trip to South Korea - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Send Crimson Desert your "fun and incredible videos", and you could win an all-expenses-paid trip to South Korea  Eurogamer
  2. New ‘Crimson Desert’ Patch Adds A Petting Zoo, Lost Rare Item Return  Forbes
  3. I sure hope Crimson Desert's new pet limit means I can own 100 pigeons at once, even if I'll only have 50 in camp because Pearl Abyss are cowards  Rock Paper Shotgun
  4. New Crimson Desert patch lets you hoard 100 pets and gives you more chainsaw access  Yahoo Tech
  5. Patch 1.11.00 for Crimson Desert changed the mechanics of the pinball game  GameGPU
